requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (Rwanda RS/IEC 60335-2-24 charge limits; Kigali Amendment HFC phase-down)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（卢旺达RS/IEC 60335-2-24充注量限值；基加利修正案HFC削减）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（盧旺達RS/IEC 60335-2-24充注量限值；基加利修正案HFC削減）

summary.en: Rwanda does not operate an EU-style F-Gas Regulation. Refrigerant safety for household refrigerating appliances is handled through the Rwanda-adopted RS/IEC 60335-2-24 safety standard, whose Annex AA sets flammable-refrigerant charge limits, ventilation, and ignition-source requirements for hydrocarbon refrigerants such as R-600a (isobutane, GWP approximately 3, ISO 817 classification A3). R-600a is the dominant refrigerant in modern household refrigerators and is not subject to phase-down prohibitions. On the climate side, Rwanda is a Party to the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment and runs an HFC phase-down through its National Ozone Unit / environment authority (REMA) — relevant only if an appliance still uses an HFC such as R-134a. For an R-600a refrigerator, the manufacturer must: (1) verify the R-600a charge against RS/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA limits; (2) declare the refrigerant type and charge quantity (grams) in the product documentation and on the rating plate; and (3) provide the flammable-refrigerant safety markings/instructions. Confirm the exact adopted edition of RS/IEC 60335-2-24 and any import controls on HFCs with RSB and REMA.
summary.zh: 卢旺达不设类似欧盟的氟气体法规。家用制冷器具的制冷剂安全通过卢旺达采纳的RS/IEC 60335-2-24安全标准处理，其附件AA规定了R-600a（异丁烷，GWP约3，ISO 817分类A3）等碳氢化合物制冷剂的可燃制冷剂充注量限值、通风及点火源要求。R-600a是现代家用电冰箱的主流制冷剂，不受削减禁令约束。在气候层面，卢旺达为《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》缔约方，通过其国家臭氧机构/环境主管部门（REMA）执行HFC削减——仅在器具仍使用R-134a等HFC时相关。对于R-600a电冰箱，制造商须：（1）核实R-600a充注量符合RS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值；（2）在产品文件及铭牌上声明制冷剂类型及充注量（克）；（3）提供可燃制冷剂安全标识/说明。请向RSB及REMA确认所采纳的RS/IEC 60335-2-24具体版本及任何HFC进口管制。
summary.zht: 盧旺達不設類似歐盟的氟氣體法規。家用製冷器具的製冷劑安全通過盧旺達採納的RS/IEC 60335-2-24安全標準處理，其附件AA規定了R-600a（異丁烷，GWP約3，ISO 817分類A3）等碳氫化合物製冷劑的可燃製冷劑充注量限值、通風及點火源要求。R-600a是現代家用電冰箱的主流製冷劑，不受削減禁令約束。在氣候層面，盧旺達為《蒙特利爾議定書》及其《基加利修正案》締約方，通過其國家臭氧機構/環境主管部門（REMA）執行HFC削減——僅在器具仍使用R-134a等HFC時相關。對於R-600a電冰箱，製造商須：（1）核實R-600a充注量符合RS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值；（2）在產品文件及銘牌上聲明製冷劑類型及充注量（克）；（3）提供可燃製冷劑安全標識/說明。請向RSB及REMA確認所採納的RS/IEC 60335-2-24具體版本及任何HFC進口管制。

standards_or_laws: RS/IEC 60335-2-24 (national adoption of IEC 60335-2-24) — Annex AA: requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source requirements)
Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment — Rwanda HFC phase-down (National Ozone Unit / REMA) — relevant only for HFC-charged appliances
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)

summary.en: China addresses flammable-refrigerant charge limits for household appliances within GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24. China regulates refrigeration systems more broadly through GB 9237 (aligned with ISO 5149). On the climate side, China implements its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). Because both the Chinese GB 4706.13 charge provisions and Rwanda's RS/IEC 60335-2-24 derive from the same IEC 60335-2-24 base, an R-600a appliance built to Chinese requirements is technically well-aligned with Rwanda's flammable-refrigerant safety expectations; the residual work is charge verification against the adopted RS edition and the Rwanda documentation/marking format.
summary.zh: 中国在GB 4706.13-2014内处理家用器具的可燃制冷剂充注量限值，其中纳入了源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定。中国通过GB 9237（参照ISO 5149）更广泛地管理制冷系统。在气候层面，中国依据《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）执行HFC削减，由生态环境部（MEE）管理。由于中国GB 4706.13充注量规定与卢旺达RS/IEC 60335-2-24均源自同一IEC 60335-2-24基础，按中国要求制造的R-600a器具在技术上与卢旺达可燃制冷剂安全预期高度一致；剩余工作为针对所采纳RS版本的充注量核实及卢旺达文件/标识格式。
summary.zht: 中國在GB 4706.13-2014內處理家用器具的可燃製冷劑充注量限值，其中納入了源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定。中國通過GB 9237（參照ISO 5149）更廣泛地管理製冷系統。在氣候層面，中國依據《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）執行HFC削減，由生態環境部（MEE）管理。由於中國GB 4706.13充注量規定與盧旺達RS/IEC 60335-2-24均源自同一IEC 60335-2-24基礎，按中國要求製造的R-600a器具在技術上與盧旺達可燃製冷劑安全預期高度一致；剩餘工作為針對所採納RS版本的充注量核實及盧旺達文件/標識格式。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — provisions for flammable refrigerant (R-600a) requirements in household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the gap is documentation and charge verification, not core technology: (1) the Rwanda product documentation and rating plate must explicitly state the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane), charge weight in grams, and the flammable-refrigerant safety precautions per RS/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA; (2) the R-600a charge must be verified against the Annex AA maximum limits of the specific RS/IEC 60335-2-24 edition Rwanda has adopted — a GB 4706.13 test done under a slightly different configuration should be checked for coverage, with an IECEE CB report on the IEC base standard being the cleanest evidence for the PVoC/CoC; (3) if any model in the range still uses an HFC (e.g., R-134a), confirm Rwanda import controls / Kigali phase-down handling with REMA. Note: Rwanda has no EU-style standalone F-Gas Regulation, so there is no F-Gas certification/quota analogue — the obligation is the IEC-based charge-limit safety standard plus the Montreal/Kigali climate track.
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，差距在于文件和充注量核实，而非核心技术：（1）卢旺达产品文件及铭牌须明确说明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、充注量（克）及依据RS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的可燃制冷剂安全注意事项；（2）R-600a充注量须针对卢旺达所采纳的具体RS/IEC 60335-2-24版本的附件AA最大限值核实——在略有不同配置下完成的GB 4706.13试验应检查覆盖性，而基于IEC基础标准的IECEE CB报告为PVoC/CoC的最清晰证据；（3）若产品系列中仍有型号使用HFC（如R-134a），请向REMA确认卢旺达进口管制/基加利削减处理。注：卢旺达无类似欧盟的独立氟气体法规，故无氟气体资质/配额对应——义务为基于IEC的充注量限值安全标准加上蒙特利尔/基加利气候轨道。
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，差距在於文件和充注量核實，而非核心技術：（1）盧旺達產品文件及銘牌須明確說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、充注量（克）及依據RS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的可燃製冷劑安全注意事項；（2）R-600a充注量須針對盧旺達所採納的具體RS/IEC 60335-2-24版本的附件AA最大限值核實——在略有不同配置下完成的GB 4706.13試驗應檢查覆蓋性，而基於IEC基礎標準的IECEE CB報告為PVoC/CoC的最清晰證據；（3）若產品系列中仍有型號使用HFC（如R-134a），請向REMA確認盧旺達進口管制/基加利削減處理。註：盧旺達無類似歐盟的獨立氟氣體法規，故無氟氣體資質/配額對應——義務為基於IEC的充注量限值安全標準加上蒙特利爾/基加利氣候軌道。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via RS/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA (R-600a charge limits, markings) within the safety conformity assessment; HFC handling via Montreal/Kigali through REMA. No EU-style standalone F-Gas Regulation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE

source.publisher: Rwanda Environment Management Authority (REMA) — National Ozone Unit (Montreal Protocol / Kigali Amendment)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is the dominant household-refrigerator refrigerant and faces no phase-down prohibition. Rwanda has no EU-style F-Gas Regulation; flammable-refrigerant safety runs through RS/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA charge limits within the conformity assessment, and HFC handling (only if R-134a etc. is used) runs through the Montreal/Kigali track via REMA. Because Chinese GB 4706.13 and Rwanda's RS/IEC standard share the IEC 60335-2-24 base, alignment is good — the work is charge verification and the Rwanda refrigerant-type/charge documentation and markings. verified:false — confirm the adopted RS edition and any HFC import controls with RSB/REMA.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a是家用电冰箱的主流制冷剂，不受削减禁令约束。卢旺达无类似欧盟的氟气体法规；可燃制冷剂安全通过合格评定内的RS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA充注量限值处理，HFC处理（仅在使用R-134a等时）通过REMA的蒙特利尔/基加利轨道。由于中国GB 4706.13与卢旺达RS/IEC标准共享IEC 60335-2-24基础，对齐良好——工作为充注量核实及卢旺达制冷剂类型/充注量文件和标识。verified:false——请向RSB/REMA确认所采纳RS版本及任何HFC进口管制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a是家用電冰箱的主流製冷劑，不受削減禁令約束。盧旺達無類似歐盟的氟氣體法規；可燃製冷劑安全通過合格評定內的RS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA充注量限值處理，HFC處理（僅在使用R-134a等時）通過REMA的蒙特利爾/基加利軌道。由於中國GB 4706.13與盧旺達RS/IEC標準共享IEC 60335-2-24基礎，對齊良好——工作為充注量核實及盧旺達製冷劑類型/充注量文件和標識。verified:false——請向RSB/REMA確認所採納RS版本及任何HFC進口管制。
